# ROADMAP session-intake: point at the connective planning layer (journeys, falsifiers, launch, v13.3 wave)

## Problem

The ROADMAP is the recorded session-intake entry ("start from this roadmap"), but the connective planning layer filed 2026-07-04 — the integration journeys (#14781), the release-gate falsifiers (#14782), the launch playbook (#14790), the motion bar (#14780), and the v13.3 scoping wave (#14788) — is invisible from it. Intake that can't find the connective tissue produces exactly the disconnected-leaves failure the layer exists to prevent.

## Fix

Extend the session-intake paragraph with one sentence pointing at the five artifacts (pointer-weight; the roadmap stays cornerstones-not-lists per the update-roadmap discipline).

## AC

- [ ] One-sentence addition, links resolve, no other roadmap content touched.

Self-assigned (docs-pointer class).
